items.definition_en: A phone is a device used to talk to people far away.
items.example_en: He picked up the phone and called his friend.

items.definition_en: A conversation is a talk between two or more people.
items.example_en: They had a long conversation about travel plans.

items.definition_en: A message is a piece of information sent to someone.
items.example_en: I left a message on her voicemail.

items.definition_en: A call is when you talk to someone by phone.
items.example_en: The call lasted for fifteen minutes.

items.definition_en: A receiver is the part of the phone you listen and speak into.
items.example_en: She picked up the receiver to answer the phone.

items.definition_en: A line is the connection on a telephone network.
items.example_en: The line was busy so I could not call my friend.

items.definition_en: A signal helps phones connect and send messages.
items.example_en: I lost signal in the mountains.

items.definition_en: A tower is a tall structure for sending phone signals.
items.example_en: The phone tower is near the school.

items.definition_en: A number is a set of digits used to call someone.
items.example_en: She wrote her phone number on the paper.

items.definition_en: A network connects people for communication.
items.example_en: The phone network was down during the storm.

items.definition_en: A connection is the link between people who communicate.
items.example_en: The connection was not very good.

items.definition_en: A ring is the sound a phone makes when someone calls.
items.example_en: I heard the ring and answered quickly.

items.definition_en: A phone book is a book with names and phone numbers.
items.example_en: He found the number in the phone book.

items.definition_en: An operator is a person who helps connect phone calls.
items.example_en: I asked the operator for help.

items.definition_en: A signal bar shows how strong your phone's connection is.
items.example_en: The signal bar is low on my phone right now.

items.definition_en: A dial tone is the sound you hear before making a call.
items.example_en: She waited for the dial tone before dialing.

items.definition_en: An area code is the first numbers in a phone number.
items.example_en: You must enter the area code for long distance calls.

items.definition_en: A handset is the part of a phone you hold to talk and listen.
items.example_en: He placed the handset back on the phone.

items.definition_en: A cell phone is a mobile phone you can carry with you.
items.example_en: She used her cell phone to send a message.

items.definition_en: A contact is a saved person's number on your phone.
items.example_en: I added her as a new contact.
